verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I hear people talking about everything, Words about war and peace, worldly things, But when all is said and done, I know my way With a hunger in my heart, to hear God say.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Walk with me through the forest And I’ll talk with you, Since the day Adam fell I’ve longed to talk with you To have fellowship again, It pleases me For redemption plan is over Now you can walk with me

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: With the Holy Ghost to guide me to that place Where I’ll stand not on works By His Grace When all earthly things have faded from my view I know I will hear Him say I’ll walk with you’’
